name: NY Open Range Break EURUSD
description: EURUSD on 15m. Build a range from 13:30 to 14:15 UTC. If candle closes above range high by at least 3 pips, buy. If closes below range low by 3 pips, sell. Stop goes at opposite side of range, target is 1.2R. No trades on Monday. Flatten all positions before 20:45 UTC.

name: QQQ RSI Dip-Recovery
description: QQQ 15-minute chart. When RSI 14 goes below 28, enter 40% long size. If RSI drops below 22, add remaining 60%. Exit full position when RSI reaches 52 or by end of day whichever happens first. Do not open new trades in the final 25 minutes. Long-only strategy.

name: Synthetic Loss-Escalation Ladder
description: On a synthetic 1-minute volatility stream, always predict UP with initial stake $1.50. After a losing trade, multiply next stake by 2.2. After any win, reset stake back to $1.50. Stop the session immediately if drawdown is greater than $180 or if total trades hit 60.
